### `r ad$label`

```{r}
#| eval: !expr identical(section, "scores")
if (is_html) {
  msens::plot_flower(
    ad$scores,
    fld_category = component,
    fld_height   = score,
    fld_width    = even,
    interactive  = TRUE,
    title        = ad$label)
} else {
  msens::ggplot_flower(
    ad$scores,
    fld_category = component,
    fld_height   = score,
    fld_width    = even,
    title        = ad$label)
}
```

```{r}
#| eval: !expr identical(section, "species")
#| results: asis

# emit_table is passed from the parent report.qmd via knit_child envir

d <- ad$spp
if (nrow(d) == 0) {
  cat("_No species found for this area._\n\n")
} else {
  # normalize NA er_code so pivot_wider and compute_er_score behave
  d <- d |> dplyr::mutate(
    er_code = ifelse(is.na(er_code), "NA", er_code))
  n_spp <- dplyr::n_distinct(d$mdl_seq)

  # * species count by category x extinction-risk category ----
  # consolidate individual er_codes into broader categories
  er_consolidate <- function(code) {
    authority <- stringr::str_split_i(code, ":", 1)
    status    <- stringr::str_split_i(code, ":", 2)
    dplyr::case_when(
      authority %in% c("FWS", "NMFS") & status == "EN" ~ "USA:EN(100)",
      authority %in% c("FWS", "NMFS") & status == "TN" ~ "USA:TN(50)",
      authority %in% c("FWS", "NMFS") & status == "LC" ~ "USA:LC(1)",
      authority == "IUCN" & status == "CR"              ~ "IUCN:CR(50)",
      authority == "IUCN" & status == "EN"              ~ "IUCN:EN(25)",
      authority == "IUCN" & status == "VU"              ~ "IUCN:VU(5)",
      authority == "IUCN" & status == "NT"              ~ "IUCN:NT(2)",
      TRUE                                              ~ "other(1)")
  }

  d <- d |> dplyr::mutate(er_cat = er_consolidate(er_code))

  # fixed column order (left to right by descending score priority)
  er_cat_order <- c(
    "USA:EN(100)", "USA:TN(50)", "USA:LC(1)",
    "IUCN:CR(50)", "IUCN:EN(25)", "IUCN:VU(5)", "IUCN:NT(2)",
    "other(1)")
  er_cats_seen <- intersect(er_cat_order, unique(d$er_cat))

  summary_df <- d |>
    dplyr::distinct(mdl_seq, sp_cat, er_cat) |>
    dplyr::count(sp_cat, er_cat) |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from  = er_cat,
      values_from = n,
      values_fill = 0L) |>
    dplyr::rename(Category = sp_cat) |>
    dplyr::arrange(Category) |>
    dplyr::relocate(Category, dplyr::all_of(er_cats_seen))
  # add Total column + Total row
  summary_df$Total <- rowSums(summary_df[, er_cats_seen, drop = FALSE])
  tot_row <- c(
    list(Category = "Total"),
    lapply(summary_df[, c(er_cats_seen, "Total"), drop = FALSE], sum))
  summary_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(summary_df, tibble::as_tibble(tot_row))

  # format counts with thousands comma
  summary_df <- summary_df |>
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(
      where(is.numeric), \(x) scales::comma(x, accuracy = 1)))

  emit_table(
    summary_df,
    caption = sprintf(
      "Species counts by category and extinction-risk category (%s species).",
      scales::comma(n_spp)),
    align = c("l", rep("r", ncol(summary_df) - 1)))

  cat("^[Extinction risk categories consolidated: ",
      "FWS and NMFS codes combined as USA; ",
      "parenthetical numbers indicate the extinction risk score (1\u2013100) ",
      "used in sensitivity weighting. ",
      "\"other\" includes IUCN:DD, IUCN:LC, and species with no assigned ",
      "risk code (NA = not available).]\n\n", sep = "")

  # * top-20 highest-scoring species ----
  top20 <- d |>
    dplyr::distinct(
      mdl_seq, sp_cat, sp_common, sp_scientific,
      er_code, er_score, suit_er_area) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(suit_er_area)) |>
    utils::head(20)

  top20_display <- top20 |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      Category   = sp_cat,
      Common     = if (is_html) sprintf(
        '<a href="%s/?mdl_seq=%d" target="_blank">%s</a>',
        mapsp_base, mdl_seq, sp_common) else sp_common,
      Scientific = sp_scientific,
      `ER code`  = er_code,
      `ER score` = scales::percent(er_score, accuracy = 1),
      Score      = scales::comma(round(suit_er_area, 0)))

  emit_table(
    top20_display,
    caption = "Top 20 highest-scoring species (by habitat-weighted extinction risk).",
    align   = c("l", "l", "l", "l", "r", "r"))

  # * download full species list (CSV) ----
  url <- paste0(
    api_base, "/species.csv",
    "?ver=",   utils::URLencode(ver,      reserved = TRUE),
    "&kind=",  utils::URLencode(ad$kind,  reserved = TRUE),
    "&value=", utils::URLencode(ad$value, reserved = TRUE),
    "&label=", utils::URLencode(ad$label, reserved = TRUE))
  cat(sprintf(
    "[Download full species list (CSV \u2014 %s species)](%s)\n\n",
    scales::comma(n_spp), url))
}
```
